successCriteria.description: File `src/shared/types/leave.types.ts` exists and exports all 5 enums with correct members: `LeaveStatus` (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED), `EmploymentStatus` (ACTIVE, INACTIVE, TERMINATED, ON_LEAVE), `AuditAction` (CREATED, UPDATED, DELETED, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED, SUBMITTED), `NotificationType` (LEAVE_REQUEST_SUBMITTED, LEAVE_APPROVED, LEAVE_REJECTED, LEAVE_CANCELLED, BALANCE_UPDATED), `EntityType` (EMPLOYEE, LEAVE_TYPE, LEAVE_POLICY, LEAVE_REQUEST, LEAVE_BALANCE, AUDIT_LOG, NOTIFICATION).

File `src/shared/error.types.ts` exists and exports 5 domain error classes: `NotFoundError` (extends Error, constructor takes entityName: string, id: string), `ValidationError` (extends Error, constructor takes message: string, details?: unknown[]), `ConflictError` (extends Error, constructor takes message: string), `UnauthorizedError` (extends Error, constructor takes message: string), `ForbiddenError` (extends Error, constructor takes message: string). Each class correctly extends Error and preserves its name property.

File `tests/unit/shared/error.types.test.ts` exists with Jest unit tests covering instantiation and property access for all 5 error classes: `NotFoundError` (entityName and id properties), `ValidationError` (message and details properties), `ConflictError` (message property), `UnauthorizedError` (message property), `ForbiddenError` (message property).

constraints: All TypeScript code must comply with strict mode (no implicit any, strict null checks) as declared in HARNESS.json.
Enums must use TypeScript `enum` keyword (not const objects or union types) as specified in the intent.
Tests must use Jest (as specified in the intent and HARNESS.json testCmd), not Vitest despite AGENTS.md mentioning Vitest.
outOfScope: Phase 2 — Employee domain model and repository (src/modules/employee/employee.model.ts, employee.repository.ts, migrations)
Phase 3 — LeaveType and LeavePolicy domain models and repositories
Phase 4 — LeaveBalance domain model and repository
Phase 5 — LeaveRequest domain model and repository
Phase 6 — AuditLog and Notification domain models and repositories
